caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Barbados Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing moderate easterly winds sustained at 20 kt with wave heights reaching 5.4 ft and a dominant swell direction from the ESE. Rain probability is high at 76%, presenting wet conditions, while St. Lucia sees lighter winds at 14 kt and less significant impacts.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Seas and Mild Winds Across Mediterranean Ports
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing mild westerly winds at 12 kt with moderate wave heights reaching 4.9 ft and a swell period of 13 seconds. Rain probability remains less than 10% while Mykonos reports slightly stronger winds up to 20 kt, indicating generally stable and navigable conditions throughout the Mediterranean today.
